import re, unicodedata

# Arabic normalization: remove diacritics, tatweel, punctuation; unify hamza forms; lowercase; collapse spaces.
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_re = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
punct_re = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A]')  # keep Arabic letters/digits/underscore/space
spaces_re = re.compile(r'\s+')

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        return ''
    # unify hamza: alef with hamza above/below -> ا ; alef madda -> ا ; alef wasla -> ا
    text = text.replace('\u0622','ا').replace('\u0623','ا').replace('\u0625','ا').replace('\u0671','ا')
    text = arabic_diacritics.sub('', text)
    text = tatweel_re.sub('', text)
    text = punct_re.sub(' ', text)
    text = spaces_re.sub(' ', text).strip().lower()
    return text

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming on small sequences
    # We'll cap to a certain length?
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def norm_lcs_ratio(a, b):
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    la, lb = len(a), len(b)
    lcs = lcs_length(a, b)
    return lcs / max(la, lb)

def token_f1(a, b):
    sa = set(a.split())
    sb = set(b.split())
    if not sa or not sb:
        return 0.0
    inter = len(sa & sb)
    p = inter / len(sb)
    r = inter / len(sa)
    if p+r == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*p*r/(p+r)

def sim_score(a, b):
    # combine LCS on characters and token F1
    na = normalize_arabic(a)
    nb = normalize_arabic(b)
    lcs = norm_lcs_ratio(na, nb)
    f1 = token_f1(na, nb)
    return (lcs + f1)/2, lcs, f1

def search_regex(pattern):
    # search with regex on normalized text
    pat = re.compile(pattern)
    res=[]
    for h in hadith_data:
        for field in ('Matn','hadithTxt'):
            text = h.get(field) or ''
            norm = normalize_arabic(text)
            if pat.search(norm):
                res.append((h['hadithID'], field, text))
                break
    return res

# pattern to find normalized "inn ahl aljannah la ... thiyab"
pattern = r'\b(ان|انّ|إن)\s+اهل\s+الجنة[^.]{0,40}ثياب'
res = search_regex(pattern)
len(res)
